description.zh-Hans: 生成可平铺的硬边像素锁甲，以错列椭圆金属环、交替断口、离散高光和下部阴影表现穿插关系。
description.en: Generates seamless hard-edged pixel chainmail with staggered oval links, alternating gaps, discrete highlights, and lower shadows.

triggers.zh-Hans: 锁甲, 盔甲, 金属环, 铠甲, 中世纪盔甲
triggers.en: chainmail, armor, metal rings, maille, medieval armor

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 生成可平铺的锁子甲纹理，用于角色盔甲或装备图标。
exampleUsage.en: Generate a tileable chainmail armor texture for character equipment or armor icons.
